name: BB:Policy Violation: Mail Policy Violation: Outbound Mail Sender
notes: This Building Block identifies flows that show a host sending mail to remote hosts.
bb_references: BB:Policy Violation: Mail Policy Violation: Outbound Mail Sender on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when the flow matches Application is any of [Mail.SMTP or Mail.SMTP-port]
TD_list: APPLY BB:Policy Violation: Mail Policy Violation: Outbound Mail Sender on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when the flow matches Application is any of [Mail.SMTP or Mail.SMTP-port]
